title: Pot Carrying Tray with Holes by Kingston Tools – 3 Trays/28 Cells each Tray with 96pcs 6cm Round Fibre Pots – Professional Potting On Tray – Seed Growing Tray Garden Plant Pots Shuttle Tray, Brown
features: TRANSPORT POTS EASILY: With these trays, you can carry your Kingston Tools pots all at the same time. These trays also serve as a pot holder where you can put your plants in a more organise way.
ORGANISE YOUR PLANTS: This potting tray has 28 cells per tray, giving you more room to hold and organise more plant pots. You don’t have to put your pots anywhere, no mess!
REMOVE POTS EASILY: It has a hole at the bottom so you can easily remove the pots from the tray.
COMES WITH ROUND FIBRE POTS: Product also comes with 96 pcs of 6cm Round Fibre Pots.
INCLUDES: 3 trays (28 cells per tray, total of 84 cells) of Kingston Tools Pot Carrying Tray and 1 pack of 96 pcs 6cm Round Fibre Pots
description: The Kingston Tools Pot Carrying Trays are suitable for handling pots and transferring them all at once to a place and another. These trays can also be a plant pot organiser, it has 28 cells each tray, so it has more room to hold your Kingston Tools pots. Your garden will be neat and organised with this potting on tray. No scattered pots everywhere. Moreover, this shuttle tray has a hole at the bottom, so you can easily remove the pots from the tray. Hurry and grab yours now!
